name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning check-in from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Here's a gentle look at how things landed yesterday at {{orgName}}. A few new faces reached out, some appointments moved into place, and the calendar is shaping up nicely for the week ahead.

Nothing pressing on our end — just wanted you to walk in with the full picture before the day picks up. If anything needs a closer look, it'll be waiting for you in the dashboard.

Warmly,
— Bright Smile Dental
